items.title: It takes too long to do things in the government
The 12-month window
items.summary: A lot of AI startups exist partly because the foundation models haven't expanded into their category yet. As many jokingly acknowledge, that won't last forever.

items.title: Zenskar Secures $15 Million Series A
items.summary: NEW YORK, NY, Zenskar, the AI-native billing and revenue automation platform powering Zero-Touch Finance for real-world complexity, announced a $15 million Series A led by Susquehanna Venture Capital, Bessemer Venture Partners, Shine Capital and Rho.
